package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for mixed_receiver_kinds: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Methods on the same receiver type mix pointer and value receivers.
type CaseMixedReceiverKindsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMixedReceiverKindsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMixedReceiverKindsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMixedReceiverKindsModel
}

type CaseMixedReceiverKindsService struct {
    repo *CaseMixedReceiverKindsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMixedReceiverKindsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMixedReceiverKinds(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMixedReceiverKindsDTO) error {
    focus := "mixed_receiver_kinds"
    _ = focus
    value := CaseMixedReceiverKindsModel{ID: input}
    _ = value
    mixed_receiver_kinds_positive := map[string]int{"mixed": 1, "receiver": 2, "kinds": 3}
    mixed_receiver_kinds_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    mixed_positive_0 := mixed_receiver_kinds_positive["mixed"] + len(input)
    _ = mixed_positive_0
    receiver_positive_1 := mixed_receiver_kinds_positive["receiver"] + len(input)
    _ = receiver_positive_1
    kinds_positive_2 := mixed_receiver_kinds_positive["kinds"] + len(input)
    _ = kinds_positive_2
    return nil
}
